name: Open Option Positions With Details Test
description: Test case for retrieving currently-open option positions enriched with call/put details and Greeks through agent interaction

parts.text: Show me my currently open option positions with full details including call/put type and Greeks in a bulleted list.

Here are your open option positions with details:

*   **Option Type**: call/put
*   **Greeks**: delta, gamma, theta, vega
*   **Status**: success
